zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth FitzRoger於1370年8月15日出生在英國薩默塞特修頓時，她的父親Reynold Grey II8歲，母親Elizabeth de Ros5歲。她於大約1392年與Sir John Bonville在英國薩默塞特修頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年4月10日在英國戴文書特享年43歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿可明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth FitzRoger于1370年8月15日出生在英国薩默塞特修頓时，她的父亲Reynold Grey II8岁，母亲Elizabeth de Ros5岁。她于大约1392年与Sir John Bonville在英国薩默塞特修頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年4月10日在英国戴文書特享年43岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿可明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth FitzRoger was born on 15 August 1370, in Chewton, Somerset, England, her father, Reynold Grey II, was 8 and her mother, Elizabeth de Ros, was 5. She married Sir John Bonville about 1392, in Chewton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 April 1414, in Shute, Devon, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Axminster, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth FitzRoger est née le 15 août 1370, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Reynold Grey II, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Ros, avait 5 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Bonville environ 1392, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1414, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth FitzRoger am 15. August 1370 in Chewton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reynold Grey II 8 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Ros 5. Sie hat um 1392 in Chewton, Somerset, England Sir John Bonville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1414 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Shute, Devon, England und wurde in Axminster, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzRoger è nata il il 15 agosto 1370 nel Chewton, Somerset, England, sua padre, Reynold Grey II, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Ros, aveva 5 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Bonville circa 1392, nel Chewton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1414, nel Shute, Devon, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Axminster, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzRogerが1370年8月15日にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンで生まれた時，父Reynold Grey IIは8歳，母Elizabeth de Rosは5歳であった。約1392年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンでSir John Bonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年4月10日にイギリスデボンシュトで43歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアクスミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzRoger(이)가 1370년 8월 15일 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reynold Grey II(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ros(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 대략 1392년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 Sir John Bonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 4월 10일 영국 데폰 슈트에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 액민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.15 August 1370–10 April 1414: 15 de agosto de 1370–10 de abril de 1414
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzRoger nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1370, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reynold Grey II, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Ros, tinha 5 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Bonville aproximadamente 1392, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1414, em Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth FitzRoger родилась 15 августа 1370 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Reynold Grey II было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Ros, 5. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Bonville около 1392 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 апреля 1414 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия.

es.15 August 1370–10 April 1414: 15 de agosto de 1370–10 de abril de 1414
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth FitzRoger nació el 15 de agosto de 1370, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Reynold Grey II, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Ros, tenía 5 años. Se casó con Sir John Bonville aproximadamente 1392, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1414, en Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.
